{ "name": "symfony/service-contracts", "type": "library", "description": "Generic abstractions related to writing services", "keywords": ["abstractions", "contracts", "decoupling", "interfaces", "interoperability", "standards"], "homepage": "https://symfony.com", "license": "MIT", "authors": [ { "name": "Nicolas Grekas", "email": "p@tchwork.com" }, { "name": "Symfony Community", "homepage": "https://symfony.com/contributors" } ], "require": { "php": ">=8.1", "psr/container": "^1.1|^2.0", "symfony/deprecation-contracts": "^2.5|^3" }, "conflict": { "ext-psr": "<1.1|>=2" }, "autoload": { "psr-4": { "Symfony\\Contracts\\Service\\": "" }, "exclude-from-classmap": [ "/Test/" ] }, "minimum-stability": "dev", "extra": { "branch-alias": { "dev-main": "3.6-dev" }, "thanks": { "name": "symfony/contracts", "url": "https://github.com/symfony/contracts" } } }
